title: Taiwan Could Learn From Ukraine. Informally, Connections Are Growing.
summary_full: The governments have no official diplomatic or military ties. But a loose network led by company executives and volunteers is bridging some of that gulf.
summary_public: The governments have no official diplomatic or military ties. But a loose network led by company executives and volunteers is bridging some of that gulf.
